title: tanacetum sclerophyllum
intro: Tanacetum sclerophyllum, also known as mountain tansy or alpine tansy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tanacetum sclerophyllum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
